$comment: Source of truth for the apodictic:feedback_item block (Feedback Triage workflow). Validated by scripts/apodictic_artifacts.py (stdlib subset checker) via scripts/feedback_triage.py. `assessment` is whether APODICTIC's own analysis confirmed the external claim; `triage` is the disposition (kept orthogonal to the canonical Must-Fix/Should-Fix/Could-Fix severity scale on purpose). Closed-key (additionalProperties:false) enforced by the engine (Harness Contracts v2): all optional fields (conflicts_with, evidence_refs) are declared, so a misspelled field now fails. Declared closed in schemas/_coverage.json. See docs/feedback-triage.md.
title: APODICTIC feedback item (apodictic.feedback_item.v1)
